name: Mistral Medium (original)
note: Early closed top-tier endpoint launched with la Plateforme beta; 8.6 MT-Bench; direct ancestor of Large/Medium 3.
verificationNotes: Confirmed via mistral.ai/news/la-plateforme/ (fetched directly): dated 2023-12-11, describes 'mistral-medium' as a prototype closed endpoint scoring 8.6 on MT-Bench and mastering English/French/Italian/German/Spanish + code (5 languages, matches langCount). Pricing $2.75/$8.10 corroborated by independent pricing trackers; context window listed as ~33K on artificialanalysis.ai (rounds to the 32K class stated). No changes needed.
